description: Interactive themes × quarters product roadmap. Auto-discovers lane sections + initiative articles; editable mode wires drag-to-reschedule, drag-to-resize, and drop-on-lane.

attributes.name: start
attributes.description: First date in the range (ISO 8601 or "YYYY-Qn"; required)

attributes.name: end
attributes.description: Last date in the range (ISO 8601 or "YYYY-Qn"; required, inclusive)

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Wire drag-to-reschedule, drag-to-resize, and lane drop

attributes.name: today-marker
attributes.description: Render a vertical line at today's date if it falls within the range

structure.description: One per initiative bar inside a lane (data-status sets the bar color)

childAttributes.name: data-lane
childAttributes.description: Lane name (used as the row label)

events.name: product-roadmap:reschedule
events.description: Fired after drag-to-move snaps to grid

events.name: product-roadmap:resize
events.description: Fired after drag-to-resize snaps to grid

events.name: product-roadmap:move
events.description: Fired after a bar drops on a different lane
